name: Low Fat Shrimp Fettuccini with Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups low-fat fettuccini noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cottage cheese, cream cheese, and evaporated skim milk in a food processor or blender. Blend until very smooth, like a cream. Set aside.
2. In a saucepan, sauté the cooked shrimp with liquid butter buds. Add parsley and pepper.
3. Add the prepared sauce to the shrimp, stirring until combined. Simmer for 1-2 minutes.
4. Stir in the parmesan cheese.
5. Serve warm over low-fat fettuccini noodles. Yields 2 servings.
